info.title: EDCS API
info.description: The Elite Dangerous Companion Suite API provides galaxy data from Elite Dangerous to various consumers, including the EDCS frontend at https://edcs.app. Data is sourced from EDSM (Elite Dangerous Star Map), EDDN (Elite Dangerous Data Network), and the Frontier Companion API (CAPI).

put.description: Updates the Inara and/or EDSM API keys for the authenticated commander.

get.summary: Get availability metadata for all data dumps
get.description: Returns an object keyed by dump type. Each entry reports whether the file has been generated, its compressed size in bytes, and the ISO 8601 timestamp of the last build. Use this to display freshness information in a UI before triggering a download.

available.description: Whether the dump file has been generated

size.description: Compressed file size in bytes, or null if not yet generated

built_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful build, or null if not yet generated

get.summary: Download a bulk data dump
get.description: Streams a pre-generated gzip-compressed JSON array for the requested dump type. Files are rebuilt on a nightly schedule (large dumps) or every six hours (recent-window dumps). Returns 503 if the dump has not yet been generated.

503.description: Dump not yet generated — check the manifest endpoint for availability

get.summary: Get Frontier OAuth authorization server metadata
get.description: Returns authorization server info (auth URL, token endpoint, PKCE parameters) for the frontend to construct a login redirect.

get.summary: Handle Frontier SSO OAuth callback
get.description: Exchanges the authorization code for a Frontier access token, creates/confirms the user and commander record, then redirects to the frontend with a cmdr_token HttpOnly cookie.

302.description: Redirects to frontend with cmdr_token cookie set

post.summary: Get the Frontier-authenticated user via cookie
post.description: Returns the authenticated user and their commander data using the cmdr_token HttpOnly cookie set during the SSO callback.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid cmdr_token cookie

get.summary: Get the authenticated commander profile from Frontier CAPI
get.description: Fetches the live commander profile from the Frontier Companion API and confirms/updates the stored commander record.

get.summary: Get the commander journal for a given date
get.description: Get all journal entries.

get.summary: Get the authenticated commander community goals from Frontier CAPI
get.description: Fetches the live commander community goals from the Frontier Companion API.

data.description: Commander community goals from Frontier CAPI

get.summary: Get the galaxy-tile manifest
get.description: Returns the galaxy-map tile manifest (LOD 0/1/2 tile index). Tile URLs in the manifest point at /api/galaxy/tiles/v{N}/...

503.description: Tiles have not been baked yet

get.summary: Serve a baked galaxy tile
get.description: Streams a binary tile file. Path must match v{N}/lod0.bin or v{N}/lod{1,2}/{key}.bin.

get.summary: List GalNet news articles
get.description: Returns a paginated list of in-game GalNet news articles, most recent first.

get.summary: Get a single GalNet news article by slug
get.description: Display a galnet news article.

get.summary: Get live commodity market data for a station
get.description: Returns real-time commodity prices for a station sourced from EDDN. Data is stored in Redis as it arrives from the network. Commodity internal names are mapped to human-readable display names.

200.description: Market data. Returns an empty object if no EDDN data has been received for this station yet.
User registered — returns a Sanctum bearer token

post.summary: Log in with email and password

200.description: Authenticated — returns a Sanctum bearer token

post.summary: Revoke all tokens for the authenticated user

get.summary: Get the authenticated user with commander details
get.description: Fetch authenticated user

get.summary: Find the best stations to buy from / sell to for a commodity
get.description: Returns two ranked lists for the given commodity: stations selling it cheapest (best places to buy from) and stations paying the most for it (best places to sell to). Backed by a Redis inverted index updated live from EDDN. Optional location filtering constrains results to systems within the given distance of a reference system.

parameters.name: near_system
parameters.description: System slug to use as a location filter origin

parameters.name: ly
parameters.description: Search radius in light years from near_system (default: 100, max: 5000)

parameters.name: min_stock
parameters.description: Minimum stock to include on the buy side

parameters.name: min_demand
parameters.description: Minimum demand to include on the sell side

200.description: Best buy-from and sell-to listings for the commodity

get.summary: Find profitable commodity trade routes
get.description: For every commodity that has at least one buy and one sell station in the live index, pairs the cheapest buy station with the highest-paying sell station and returns the best routes by profit per unit. Optionally constrains both ends to systems within a given distance of a reference system. Results are cached for 5 minutes.

parameters.name: near_system
parameters.description: System slug to use as a location filter origin. When provided, both the buy and sell stations must be within `ly` of this system.

parameters.name: ly
parameters.description: Search radius in light years from near_system (default: 100, max: 5000)

parameters.name: min_stock
parameters.description: Minimum stock at the buy station (default: 1)

parameters.name: min_demand
parameters.description: Minimum demand at the sell station (default: 1)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum routes to return, sorted by profit (default: 20, max: 100)

200.description: Trade routes ordered by profit per unit

get.summary: Find systems within a given distance of a position
get.description: Returns a paginated list of systems within the specified number of light years from a position, sorted by distance. The position can be specified either by a system slug or by raw galactic (x, y, z) coordinates — slug takes precedence if both are provided.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: System slug ({id64}-{name}) to use as the search origin

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Galactic X coordinate (required when slug is not provided)

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Galactic Y coordinate (required when slug is not provided)

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: Galactic Z coordinate (required when slug is not provided)

parameters.name: ly
parameters.description: Search radius in light years (default: 100, max: 5000)

200.description: Systems within the given distance, each with a calculated distance field

get.summary: Search systems by political and demographic attributes
get.description: Filters systems by population (minimum), security, government, allegiance, and economy. All text filters are partial-match.

get.summary: Find the shortest jump route between two systems
get.description: Computes the shortest route between two systems within the given jump range. Returns an ordered list of waypoints with per-hop and cumulative distances. Results are cached for 24 hours.

parameters.name: ly
parameters.description: Maximum jump range in light years (min: 1, max: 500)

404.description: No route found within the given jump range

get.summary: Get a single station by slug
get.description: Retrieves a station, outpost, or megaship by its slug ({market_id}-{name}). Pass withSystem to embed the parent system and its bodies.

parameters.name: withSystem
parameters.description: Embed the parent system and its bodies

get.summary: Get aggregate database statistics
get.description: Returns counts of systems, bodies, and stations. Results are cached and refreshed hourly by the scheduler.

parameters.name: flushCache
parameters.description: Pass 1 to flush the cache and force a fresh calculation

get.summary: Get a single celestial body by slug
get.description: Retrieves a star, planet, or moon by its slug ({body_id}-{name}). Pass withSystem to embed the parent system, withStations to also embed the system's stations.

get.summary: List or search star systems
get.description: Returns a paginated list of systems. When no name is given the results are served from cache. Pass withInformation, withBodies, or withStations to embed related data.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by system name (partial match by default)

parameters.name: withFleetCarriers
parameters.description: Embed fleet carriers currently docked in the system

get.summary: Get a single system by slug
get.description: Retrieves a system by its slug ({id64}-{name}). If not in the local database the API transparently queries EDSM and stores the result. Pass withInformation, withBodies, or withStations to embed related data.

parameters.name: withFleetCarriers
parameters.description: Embed fleet carriers currently docked in the system

get.summary: Get the most recently updated system
get.description: Returns the system with the latest updated_at timestamp, including its bodies and information. Useful for monitoring data freshness.

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum bearer token. Obtain via POST /auth/login or the Frontier SSO flow.

tags.name: Frontier CAPI
tags.description: Frontier Companion API — authenticated commander data

tags.name: System Search
tags.description: Search and utility endpoints for systems

tags.name: Market
tags.description: Live commodity market data from EDDN

tags.name: Data Downloads
tags.description: Bulk compressed dataset exports — systems, bodies, stations, and fleet carriers
